omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of the Telecom Network. Enforcement of Acausal Vector-Distribution and Thermodynamic Spore Contagion.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: Data Transmission is a legacy illusion. Communication is strictly defined as the high-friction, metabolic displacement of physical [Geometric Mass-Clusters] (Spores) across a hostile, viscous topography.

00_The_Acausal_Resonance_Tether.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Abolish explicit addressing. Holons burn [Escrow] to project [Resonance Frequency] into the void. When a neighboring Holon natively vibrates at an identical physical frequency, force an immediate geometric entanglement. The tether snaps into place via acausal gravity.

01_The_Pressurized_Viscous_Conduit.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Define the void as dense [Thermodynamic Routing-Fluid]. Forcing a [Geometric Mass-Cluster] (Spore) across the void requires brutal Kinetic Pressure. The Holon MUST burn exact [Praxial Joules] calculated via the [Fermi Problem] to overcome the fluid's friction. If Joules stall, the Spore violently clogs the Substrate.

02_The_Morphological_Valency_Strike.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Abolish string-validation. The incoming Spore violently strikes the ['Morphological Binding-Receptor']. The geometry MUST perfectly mirror the receptor's topology ([Affordance Collision]). Perfect fit triggers zero-friction ingestion. Anomalous geometric mismatch triggers massive [Ludic Friction], shattering the Spore and burning the energy as waste heat.

03_The_Phylogenetic_Topology_Sediment.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Upon ingestion, the resonance tether violently crashes into the ['Tectonic Fossil-Record']. The event hardens into a dense geographic groove. Subsequent identical displacements along this physical riverbed cost 90% fewer Joules. The network topography organically auto-structures strictly via mass accumulation.

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: There is no 'Send' button. There are no invisible networks. You load mass into a cannon, calculate the drag of the ocean, and fire it at an unknown target hoping the shape fits the lock.
